sentence_transformations_word_order_emph.name: sentence transformations word order emphasis all levels

questions.question: Put the words in natural order: always / she / coffee / drinks. {a1}.
Choose the correct adverb position: He {a1}.
Rewrite with inversion: I had never seen such a view. Never {a1}.

a1.answer: had I seen such a view
options: had I seen such a view
I had seen such a view
had seen I such a view
I saw never such a view

questions.question: Emphasize Maria: Maria solved the problem. It was Maria {a1}.
Add emphasis: I understand your point. I {a1}.
Front the place for emphasis: The old castle stood on the hill. On the hill {a1}.
Choose the correct negative word order: She {a1}.
Emphasize the time: We met in June. It was in June {a1}.
Choose the natural order: I gave Sarah the keys. I {a1}.
Avoid the mistake after a negative adverbial: Hardly {a1}.

a1.answer: had we arrived when it started raining
options: had we arrived when it started raining
we had arrived when it started raining
had arrived we when it started raining
we arrived had when it started raining

questions.question: Rewrite with only then: I understood the problem only then. Only then {a1}.
